tools.core.read_file.description: Read a UTF-8 text file inside the workspace.
tools.core.read_file.path: Relative path to the workspace file to read.
tools.core.write_file.description: Write a UTF-8 text file inside the workspace.
tools.core.write_file.path: Relative path to the workspace file to write.
tools.core.write_file.content: UTF-8 text content to write to the file.
tools.core.bash.description: Run a shell command inside the workspace sandbox.
tools.core.bash.command: Shell command to execute inside the current workspace.
tools.core.read_hermit_file.description: Read a UTF-8 text file inside the Hermit config directory.
tools.core.read_hermit_file.path: Relative path inside the Hermit config directory to read.
tools.core.write_hermit_file.description: Write a UTF-8 text file inside the Hermit config directory.
tools.core.write_hermit_file.path: Relative path inside the Hermit config directory to write.
tools.core.write_hermit_file.content: UTF-8 text content to write to the Hermit config file.
tools.core.list_hermit_files.description: List files and directories inside the Hermit config directory.
tools.core.list_hermit_files.path: Relative path inside the Hermit config directory to list. Defaults to '.'.
tools.scheduler.common.not_found: Error: no task with id '{job_id}' found.
tools.scheduler.common.engine_not_runnin: Scheduler engine not running. Scheduled tasks require `hermit serve` to be active.
tools.scheduler.create.error.required: Error: name, prompt, and schedule_type are required.
tools.scheduler.create.error.cron_requir: Error: cron_expr is required for schedule_type 'cron'.
tools.scheduler.create.error.once_requir: Error: once_at is required for schedule_type 'once'.
tools.scheduler.create.error.invalid_dat: Error: invalid datetime format for once_at: {once_at}. Use ISO format.
tools.scheduler.create.error.once_past: Error: once_at must be in the future.
tools.scheduler.create.error.interval_re: Error: interval_seconds is required and must be >= 60.
tools.scheduler.create.success: Scheduled task created: [{job_id}] {name} ({schedule_type}), next run at {next_run}.
tools.scheduler.create.description: Create a new scheduled task that will execute an agent prompt at specified times. Supports cron expressions (e.g. '0 9 * * 1-5' for weekdays at 9am), one-time execution, and fixed intervals. IMPORTANT: When called from a Feishu chat, always pass the feishu_chat_id from <feishu_chat_id>...</feishu_chat_id> in the context so results are pushed back to this chat.
tools.scheduler.create.name: Human-readable task name.
tools.scheduler.create.prompt: Agent prompt to execute when the task runs.
tools.scheduler.create.cron_expr: Cron expression to use when schedule_type is 'cron'.
tools.scheduler.create.once_at: One-time execution timestamp in ISO format when schedule_type is 'once'.
tools.scheduler.create.interval_seconds: Fixed interval in seconds when schedule_type is 'interval'. Minimum 60.
tools.scheduler.create.max_retries: Maximum retry attempts after a failed run. Defaults to 1.
tools.scheduler.create.feishu_chat_id: Feishu chat_id to push the execution result to.
tools.scheduler.list.title: Scheduled tasks ({count})
tools.scheduler.list.description: List all scheduled tasks with their status, schedule, and next/last run times.
tools.scheduler.delete.description: Delete a scheduled task by its ID.
tools.scheduler.delete.job_id: ID of the scheduled task to delete.
tools.scheduler.update.error.no_fields: Error: no fields to update. Provide name, prompt, enabled, cron_expr, or feishu_chat_id.
tools.scheduler.update.description: Update an existing scheduled task's name, prompt, enabled status, or cron expression.
tools.scheduler.update.job_id: ID of the scheduled task to update.
tools.scheduler.update.name: New human-readable task name.
tools.scheduler.update.prompt: New agent prompt to execute for this task.
tools.scheduler.update.cron_expr: Replacement cron expression for cron-based tasks.
tools.scheduler.update.feishu_chat_id: Replacement Feishu chat_id for notifications. Pass an empty string to clear it.
tools.scheduler.history.title: Execution history ({count} records)
tools.scheduler.history.description: Query the execution history of scheduled tasks. Use this to answer questions like 'how many times has a task run', 'did it succeed', 'when was the last execution', or 'show me the results'. Returns recent execution records with timestamps, duration, and result previews.
tools.scheduler.history.job_id: Optional task ID to filter execution history.
tools.scheduler.history.limit: Maximum number of execution records to return. Defaults to 20.
tools.webhook.common.restart_note: Restart `hermit serve` for changes to take effect.
tools.webhook.common.not_found: Error: route '{name}' not found. Existing routes: {existing}
tools.webhook.list.empty: No webhook routes configured. Config path: {config_path}
tools.webhook.list.title: Routes ({count}):
tools.webhook.list.description: List all configured webhook routes from ~/.hermit/webhooks.json. Use to show the user what webhooks are set up, their paths, templates, and notification targets.
tools.webhook.add.error.exists: Error: route '{name}' already exists. Pass overwrite=true to replace it.
tools.webhook.add.description: Add a new webhook route to ~/.hermit/webhooks.json. The route receives HTTP POST events and triggers an agent task using the prompt_template. Requires restarting `hermit serve` to take effect.
tools.webhook.add.name: Short identifier for the route (for example 'github' or 'zendesk'). Used in the URL path.
tools.webhook.add.prompt_template: Template for the agent prompt. Use {field} to inject payload values and {nested.field} for nested JSON. Example: 'PR: {pull_request.title} on {repository.full_name}'.
tools.webhook.add.path: Optional HTTP path override. Defaults to /webhook/{name}.
tools.webhook.add.secret: HMAC-SHA256 secret for signature verification. Leave empty to skip verification.
tools.webhook.add.signature_header: Header name containing the signature. Defaults to X-Hub-Signature-256.
tools.webhook.add.feishu_chat_id: Feishu chat_id to push results to (oc_xxx for groups, ou_xxx for DMs). Read it from <feishu_chat_id>...</feishu_chat_id> in the current Feishu message context.
tools.webhook.add.overwrite: Replace an existing route with the same name. Defaults to false.
tools.webhook.delete.success:
Webhook route '{name}' deleted.
Restart `hermit serve` for the change to take effect.
tools.webhook.delete.description: Delete a webhook route from ~/.hermit/webhooks.json by name. Requires restarting serve.
tools.webhook.delete.name: Name of the webhook route to delete.
tools.webhook.update.error.no_fields: Error: no fields to update. Provide prompt_template, path, secret, or feishu_chat_id.
tools.webhook.update.description: Update an existing webhook route's prompt_template, path, secret, or feishu_chat_id. Requires restarting serve.
tools.webhook.update.name: Name of the webhook route to update.
tools.webhook.update.secret: New HMAC secret. Pass an empty string to remove signature verification.
tools.webhook.update.feishu_chat_id: New Feishu chat_id. Pass an empty string to disable push notifications.
tools.web.search.results.title: ## Search Results
tools.web.search.description: Search the web and return real search results. Supports any query: facts, weather, news, documentation, code, and more. Returns top search results with titles, snippets, and URLs. For recent events or breaking news, set search_type='news' and/or time_filter='day' or 'week' to filter by recency.
tools.web.search.max_results: Maximum number of results to return. Default 8, maximum 20.
tools.web.search.region: Region code, for example 'us-en', 'cn-zh', or 'wt-wt' for worldwide.
tools.web.search.time_filter: Filter results by recency. Use 'day' for the last 24 hours, 'week' for the last 7 days, 'month' for the last 30 days, or 'year' for the last year. Omit for all-time results.
tools.web.search.search_type: Search mode. Use 'news' to query the news index for current events and breaking news. Default is 'web'.
tools.web.fetch.no_content: Fetched {url} but could not extract text content (the page may require JavaScript).
tools.web.fetch.truncated: ... [truncated at {max_length} chars, full page is {full_length} chars]
tools.web.fetch.content.title:
# Content from {url}

{text}
tools.web.fetch.description: Fetch a web page by URL and return its text content in a readable format. Strips HTML tags, scripts, styles, and extracts the main text. Useful for reading articles, documentation, API references, blog posts, and similar pages.
tools.web.fetch.max_length: Maximum number of characters to return. Default 20000.
tools.grok.search.error.missing_key: Error: XAI_API_KEY is not set. Please set the XAI_API_KEY environment variable with your xAI API key.
tools.grok.search.error.out_of_credit:
xAI account credit is exhausted: {error}
Please visit https://console.x.ai to add credit or raise usage limits.
tools.grok.search.error.invalid_key: xAI API key is invalid or expired. Please check XAI_API_KEY.
tools.grok.search.citations.title: ## Sources
tools.grok.search.description: Search the web using Grok (xAI) with real-time live search. Unlike web_search (DuckDuckGo), Grok directly reads and synthesizes current web content, which is ideal for breaking news, stock prices, recent events, or any query where freshness matters. Returns a comprehensive answer with inline citations. Requires XAI_API_KEY to be set.
tools.grok.search.query: The question or search query. This can be a natural-language question such as 'Why did MiniMax stock surge today?' or a plain search phrase.
tools.grok.search.search_mode: Live search mode. 'auto' (default) lets Grok decide when to search, 'on' forces live search, and 'off' uses Grok's training data only.
tools.grok.search.max_tokens: Maximum tokens in the response. Default 2048.
